creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
I'm not able to build x11-themes/kde4-wallpapers-freebsd with poudriere.

Output of poudriere log:
=======================<phase: run-depends    >============================
===>   kde4-wallpapers-freebsd-1.0 depends on package: kdehier4>=0 - not found
===>    Verifying install for kdehier4>=0 in /usr/ports/misc/kdehier4
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/kdehier4-1.1.1.tbz
libdata/ldconfig/kdehier4: Failed to create dir 'libdata/ldconfig'Can't create 'libdata/ldconfig/kdehier4'
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_add: tar extract of /packages/All/kdehier4-1.1.1.tbz failed!
pkg_add: unable to extract '/packages/All/kdehier4-1.1.1.tbz'!
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-themes/kde4-wallpapers-freebsd.
====>> Saved kde4-wallpapers-freebsd-1.0 wrkdir to: /home/poudriere/data/wrkdirs/j8sp64-PT2/PT2/kde4-wallpapers-freebsd-1.0.tbz
build of /usr/ports/x11-themes/kde4-wallpapers-freebsd ended at Mon Jul 29 16:01:19 CEST 2013
build time: 00:00:04

Fix: 

It seems to me that if misc/kdehier4 is the very first dependency to be installed for build, /usr/local/libdata/ldconfig doesn't get created which leads to this error. So maybe misc/kdehier4 is to blame for this behavior.
How-To-Repeat: poudriere bulk -p <portstree> -j <jail> x11-themes/kde4-wallpapers-freebsd
